introSection: Galaxi is a steel roller coaster located at Cliff's Amusement Park in Albuquerque, New Mexico, USA. It opened in 1977 and is the oldest operating roller coaster in the state of New Mexico.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Galaxi is a standard SDC Galaxi. It has no inversions.

fullText:
Galaxi is a steel roller coaster located at Cliff's Amusement Park in Albuquerque, New Mexico, USA. It opened in 1977 and is the oldest operating roller coaster in the state of New Mexico.

Galaxi is a standard SDC Galaxi. It has no inversions.
